name: Dr Alan Darmawan
title: Postdoctoral Researcher
department: School of Languages, Cultures and Linguistics
expertise_topics: Dr Darmawan's research interests include interdisciplinary studies on the politics of heritage in island Southeast Asia
cultural revival such as Malay kingdoms
as well as Islam and writing practices in the Malay world
research_interests: Dr Darmawan's research interests include interdisciplinary studies on the politics of heritage in island Southeast Asia, transnational Malay identity, cultural revival such as Malay kingdoms, traditional performance practices, as well as Islam and writing practices in the Malay world.
